dimensions.name: Total Axiom Count (Named + Hidden)
dimensions.margin: Trivial: CE-003 has 1 fewer total axiom

dimensions.name: Parsimony (Derivations / Total Axioms)
dimensions.margin: ToL is 3× more parsimonious by derivation density

dimensions.name: Last-Round Solution Quality

CE003.note: MS-A4 is ad hoc, empirically falsifiable, bypassable

ToL.note: Resurrection is derived, metaphysical, immune to dying-person counterexample

dimensions.margin: ToL's solution is structurally superior on all 6 evaluated dimensions

dimensions.name: Derivational Depth
dimensions.margin: ToL derives 3× more conclusions from its axioms

dimensions.name: AI Applicability
dimensions.margin: ToL is structurally more applicable to AI alignment

dimensions.name: Agreement Admissibility

CE003.value: Fails for: secular materialists (MS-A4), determinists, utilitarians, AI agents

ToL.value: Fails for: determinists (same); stronger for communitarians, utilitarians, AI agents

dimensions.margin: Marginal: ToL slightly broader acceptance across rational agent types

CE003.value: MS-A4 fails 4/4 adversarial attacks; MS-A3 has definitional problem; MS-A2 has partial redundancy

ToL.value: Resurrection survives all 4 adversarial attacks; core chain valid; 5 of 8 inference tests valid

dimensions.name: Explanatory Power

ToL.value: Explains: property rights, anti-statism, last-round, accountability, AI alignment, religion-state relationship, game-theoretic stability, moral realism grounding

dimensions.margin: ToL explains 5+ additional phenomena not covered by CE-003

dimensions.name: Ad Hoc Axioms
dimensions.margin: Critical defect for CE-003: an ad hoc axiom undermines formal credibility

score_summary.method: Sum of (weight × (1 if winner=ToL, 0.5 if tied, 0 if winner=CE-003))
score_summary.verdict: Theory of Liberty wins 76/81 weighted dimensions (94%). CE-003 wins 5/81 weighted dimensions (6%). CE-003's only advantage is named axiom count (2 fewer). This is a minor syntactic advantage that disappears when hidden axioms, derivational depth, robustness, formalizability, and ad hoc character are counted.
